item.title: DTCC starts live tokenized securities trades with BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, and 50+ firms; full launch set for October 2026
Circle receives OCC approval to establish a national digital-currency trust bank, clearing path for institutional stablecoin custody
Six US agencies face July 18 deadline to finalize GENIUS Act stablecoin rules; no agency has published a completed framework
Visa launches stablecoin payment platform with 140+ participating institutions, enabling onchain settlement without custom infrastructure
SEC places three crypto rules on July 2026 agenda covering token offerings, broker-dealer custody, and alternative trading system standards
CLARITY Act Senate vote remains uncertain after three Democrats oppose merged draft that omits demanded ethics provision
Ostium loses $18 million to oracle manipulation exploit as attacker submits future-dated price reports to trigger USDC payouts
Newest CLARITY Act draft expected within days as Senate window before August recess narrows to roughly three weeks
SEC plans rule proposal to ease crypto fundraising for startups, targeting issuance of a notice of proposed rulemaking this month
Summer.fi halts Lazy Summer vaults after flash loan attack drains $6 million from USDC yield pools
White hat researchers disclose patched Aptos blockchain flaw that could have put $70 billion in digital assets at systemic risk
Sony receives conditional OCC approval for $40 million stablecoin trust bank to support PlayStation and entertainment payments
